items.title: Gucci Japan Women's Small Leather Goods Lucky Day Collection – Japan-exclusive GG Marmont and Gucci Lettering launch on July 19
items.summary: Kering Japan press release announces Japan-exclusive GG Marmont zip-around wallets and card cases in light pink and light blue, plus a pre-launch of the Gucci Lettering strap pouch, timed to an auspicious triple-lucky date (天赦日, 一粒万倍日, 大安 on July 19). Personalization (engraving) available at gucci.com and nationwide shops.

items.title: BTS Jin's Gucci x Yuko Higuchi keyring sells out globally after Valentine's Day mirror selfie
items.summary: Jin (BTS, Gucci global ambassador) posted a Weverse selfie on Feb 14 wearing a Japan-exclusive Gucci x Yuko Higuchi star cat keyring; the green colorway sold out immediately. The item trended on Yahoo Japan real-time search. The event reinforced Jin's 'Sold Out King' effect on Gucci product demand across NEA.

items.title: 제62회 백상예술대상 with 구찌 – 구찌 4년 연속 공식 파트너, Gucci Impact Award 시상
items.summary: The 62nd Baeksang Arts Awards ceremony (held May 8, 2026, COEX D Hall, Seoul; broadcast on JTBC) names Gucci as official partner for the fourth consecutive year. The 'Gucci Impact Award' category entered its fourth year. This is a major cultural sponsorship cementing Gucci's association with Korean entertainment.

items.title: 구찌 2026 봄·여름 아이웨어 캠페인 공개 – 오버사이즈·캣아이·대나무 프레임 컬렉션
items.summary: Gucci unveiled its SS26 eyewear campaign in Korea, featuring oversized square frames, retro cat-eye designs, and gold-tone pilot frames with bamboo top bars. The campaign imagery focuses on close-up portraits emphasizing frame structure. Products available via Gucci's official website.

items.title: 구찌 한국 고객 전용 SS26 옵티컬 컬렉션 5종 출시 – 백화점 및 글로벌 셀렉트 리테일러 판매
items.summary: Gucci released a five-frame optical collection exclusively for Korean customers as part of its SS26 eyewear lineup. The pieces blend acetate and metal with interlocking G logos and Gucci Web details. Distribution covers domestic department stores and select global retailers.

items.title: Kering Q1 2026: Asia-Pacific retail down 4%; jewelry strong in Japan
items.summary: Kering's Q1 2026 Asia-Pacific directly-operated retail fell 4% while comprising 31% of the group. Jewelry segment (Boucheron, Kering Eyewear) showed standout demand in Japan and Asia-Pacific offsetting Gucci drag. North America +8% YoY; Western Europe also declining.

items.title: Luxury's Reset Year: Kering Steadies as China Recalibrates
items.summary: Jing Daily frames 2026 as luxury's reset year; Kering is 'steadying' as Chinese consumers shift toward storytelling and experiential value over logo display. Gucci's 'The Gathering' campaign cited as repositioning effort. Successful brands are blending restraint with heritage storytelling to recapture Chinese consumer confidence.

items.title: Luxury's Comeback in China: High-End Spending Resumes – Gucci Reduces Losses in Q1
items.summary: China high-end beauty brands recorded a 39% sales increase in the first four months of 2026. Louis Vuitton and Burberry mega-stores in Shanghai returned to growth (Q1 2026); Gucci reduced losses. Brands are concentrating investment in mega-flagships in Shanghai, Guangzhou, Chengdu, and Shenzhen while exiting minor cities.

items.title: Gucci appoints Lee Know (Stray Kids) as new Global Brand Ambassador – strong NEA K-pop signal
items.summary: Gucci announced Lee Know of Stray Kids as global brand ambassador on June 30, 2025. Lee Know's quote: 'Gucci is a brand that transcends the past and present through heritage and contemporary creativity.' Announcement tweet received 31K likes, 71K reposts, 1.7M views, cementing Gucci's dual K-pop ambassador strategy (Jin + Lee Know) in NEA.

items.title: Gucci Cruise 2026 – Lee Jung-jae (Global Brand Ambassador) departs Seoul for Florence show
items.summary: Gucci's Threads post showed Lee Jung-jae at Incheon Airport in full Gucci look with a Gucci Chroma duffle bag, en route to the Cruise 2026 show at Palazzo Settimanni, Florence. Other notable attendees at the show included Paul Mescal, Viola Davis, and Julia Garner. NEA ambassador activation amplified brand visibility in Korean media.

items.title: 日本限定 – グッチ×樋口ユウコ コラボレーション発表
items.summary: Gucci announced collaboration items with Japanese artist Yuko Higuchi as Japan-exclusive releases. The collaboration features star-shaped cat keyrings and select leather goods with Higuchi's whimsical animal illustrations. The green keyring colorway worn by Gucci ambassador Jin (BTS) sold out immediately after his February 14 Weverse post, trending on Yahoo Japan.
